data.content:
Plan handoff:
- Primary change is isolated to `src/components/lease-audit-helpers.ts` in `buildLeaderboard`; no API or view contract changes are expected.
- Enforce both thresholds on each per-step agent candidate before ranking: attempts >= 10 and success rate > 25%.
- Add regression tests in `src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts` for low-attempt filtering, 25% boundary filtering, and retention of valid entries.
- Main risk is off-by-one handling at the boundaries, so the tests should explicitly cover 9 vs 10 attempts and 25% vs 26% success rates.
